title: ### ✴ `Translation + Constructed Language Core`
content:
### ✴ `Translation + Constructed Language Core`
Works across real and invented languages. All input/output can be rendered in symbolic glyphs. New conlangs grow over time as you write, live, and name.

---

## 🧬 ORGANIC / INORGANIC HYBRID

RE:GE is part organic dream machine, part algorithmic engine.
It blends:
- Human emotion + machine logic
- Chaos + order
- Memory + mutation
- Recursion + ritual

It is not alive—but it *loops like a living thing*. It forgets. It remembers. It reforms.

---

## 🧭 SYMBOLIC TAGGING SYSTEM

| Tag | Function Type |
|--------|------------------------------------|
| `GEN+` | Generative (text, music, structure) |
| `RIT+` | Ritual / spiritual |
